characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, light complexion. She has long, straight dark hair and dark eyes. Her facial features are soft and she has a bright smile.
characters.wardrobe: She is wearing a simple black top.

characters.appearance: Older adult female, medium build, light complexion. She has light brown, wavy hair pulled back. She wears wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: She is wearing a light pink and purple striped long-sleeve shirt.
characters.demeanor: Focused, attentive, and happy when she succeeds.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Okay mummy, let's try. [Okay mom, let's try.]
Character B says: Quarterly. [Quarterly.]
Character A says: Dekhte hain kahan mistake hui. [Let's see where the mistake was.]
Unknown speaker says: AR. [AR.]
Character B says: AR. [AR.]
Character A says: Wapas try karo, try quarterly. [Try again, try quarterly.]
Character B says: Quarterly. [Quarterly.]
[sound effect: chime]
Character A says: Nice! Bilkul sahi. [Nice! Absolutely right.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a warm, supportive dynamic between a daughter and her mother.
- Introduces the core problem (pronunciation) and immediate app feedback.
- Ends on a positive, encouraging note when the mother gets it right.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Teaching my mom an English pronunciation hack: Supernova
Supernova gives real-time feedback on mistakes you didn't even know you were making

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Schedule. [Schedule.]
Character A says: Word pe press karo, dekhte hain. [Press on the word, let's see.]
Unknown speaker says: Ooh. [Ooh.]
Character B says: Ooh. [Ooh.]
Character A says: Chalo, ek baar aur. [Come on, one more time.]
Character B says: Schedule. [Schedule.]
[sound effect: chime]
Character A says: Better! Bahut badhiya. [Better! Very good.]
Character B says: Ooh! [Ooh!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Reinforces the app's ease of use with a second example.
- Highlights the interactive AI tutor feature (pressing the word to hear the sound).
- Shows the learner's growing confidence and joy in improving.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova's AI tutor helps her practice anytime
She's starting to sound so much clearer!

scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final call to action.
- Focuses on the core value proposition: speaking English confidently.
- Directs the user to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Speak English confidently
Practice daily with Supernova
Download the app today
